{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203033439E464EA28F2C8FE9C65"}"},"total":52246},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6880495541076885517","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很喜欢这本书哦，内容太精彩了，一个环节接一个环节，精彩不断，很喜欢。非常喜欢主角的性格，钢铁直男，好喜欢这种书。这本书简直太棒了！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1601990209,"group_id":"6868729201797630990","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无人问我粥可温，无人与我立黄昏，空有人间自由身却非人间自由人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N80BwpK6P6qw/23qYbjvIAY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"107771950005","user_name":"作者zus5s9"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"107771950005","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1653832298,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6868729201797630990","book_info":{"abstract":"易枫穿越到修炼世界，可惜修仙无望，只能当然凡人，只想安稳度日。
却不知——
他收养的一条狗，因为他吃了他的饭菜，成为一代妖王。
他随手打造的菜刀，更是成了绝世神兵，让无数大佬争的头破血流。
他收留的小徒弟，因为修炼的他的功法，成为一代仙王，引领了一个时代。
就连他最看不起的骷髅手下，都是镇压了无数世界的绝世魔王。
多年后，易枫看着一拳打碎的虚空，喃喃自语道：原来我逼王竟是我自己……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/7f38311ead7997df779f2f6a309f9fdd","author":"风凌北","author_id":"","book_id":"6868729201797630990","book_name":"你都1000级了，外面最高30级","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8f0f0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6868784322623570440","read_count":"40210","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3004085"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"1566","tags":"玄幻脑洞,无敌,玄幻,穿越,系统,东方玄幻,架空,迪化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/d9e77f565488c351cc2fe5155d2d06bd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779303814&x-signature=KsNab%2Fn%2BpmD5M0h14GmG4WezSpk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3702807450620343","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203033439E464EA28F2C8FE9C65"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读21小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":35,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4694,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":74084,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":51884},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7283923902782800698","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情前期男主无脑最强，各种套路初上映时确实很上头，一口气看了八百多章。
中期引入魔族，将修为层次扩展到圣人境界后那一段剧情显得有些套壳，但还好加入了暗影岛这一设定，多了很多新元素，也做好了小说最大的铺垫。
最后结尾稍显仓促，比如“灭世”和另一个都忘了是谁的躲在暗影岛，仓促一句“苟之大道”便无了下文；前期强调的“求死”一事，各种铺垫，最终也只是在虚拟世界重温记忆，然后成就至尊，以“无上”一词力破万敌，虽情节合理但稍显偏题；再者前期很多角色都因为数值膨胀而在后文销声匿迹，男主与白飘飘的恋情在前期也没有突出或暗示，仅仅两次不同时期偶遇，也只是“一段时间”的陪伴，“十万年等待”这一设定基本靠结尾加戏填坑，才把这对神仙眷侣海枯石烂的爱情衬托到位。
好在后面几章对剧情中重要人物的伏笔做了回收，点出了部分主线地名人名，主要配角“fen大师”的“当年往事”也算是妙笔，让人笑叹。但能感觉大决战部分的勾心斗角稍少了点，差点儿让人看着眉头一皱的弯弯，也算是本书贯彻的“男主无敌”吧。
总体而言语言偏诙谐幽默，剧情前中期都不错，就后期进程快了点，剧情叙事细节跟不上人物的境界膨胀速度。然后伏笔回收漏了一些，但章节偏多，也算是情理之中。
以上便是给四星的理由，希望作者继续加油[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1695923071,"group_id":"6868729201797630990","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nygyj6VB21fI71SgZg9Dc80xG+23akndGtgYRdnddnME","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3083457053862243","user_name":"Frostar"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3083457053862243","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6868729201797630990","book_info":{"abstract":"易枫穿越到修炼世界，可惜修仙无望，只能当然凡人，只想安稳度日。
